data.title: Shytoshi Kusama Claims Attempt To 'Erase' History After Shiba Inu Website Missed Attributing Ryoshi As Founder—What's Cooking?
data.description: Shytoshi Kusama, lead ambassador of Shiba Inu (SHIB), recently accused an attempt to erase Ryoshi's foundational role in developing the memecoin ecosystem. Kusama responded to a post by an old community member, who pointed out that the official SHIB website did not acknowledge Ryoshi and claimed the project had "no founders." Kusama expressed concerns about this alleged attempt to erase history and claim it as their own. The SHIB official account clarified that it was a minor footer error that has since been corrected and appreciated the issue being flagged. This incident sparked controversy within the SHIB community.

data.title: Mabwell Initiates Phase III Clinical Study of its Nectin-4-Targeting ADC 9MW2821 for the Treatment of Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Shanghai, Mabwell (688062.SH), an innovative biopharmaceutical firm with a complete industry chain, revealed the commencement of a Phase III clinical trial for its unique Nectin-4-targeting ADC (R&D code: 9MW2821). This trial aims to evaluate the drug's efficacy in treating a particular condition.

data.title: Boeing CEO 'Confident' Upcoming US-China Summit To Include Aircraft Orders, Says Order Dependent On Xi Jinping: 'Trump Has Been Very…'
data.description: During an earnings call, Boeing's CEO Kelly Ortberg expressed optimism regarding the company's orders from Chinese airlines in anticipation of President Donald Trump's upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Ortberg stated that the progress of these orders hinges on the negotiations and relations between the U.S. and China, but he is confident that agreements at the country level will be reached, including aircraft orders. President Trump's support for international campaigns was highlighted as a factor contributing to Boeing's outlook. Ortberg's remarks suggest a positive outlook for Boeing's business dealings with Chinese airlines.

data.title: Tuniu Discloses Cash Dividend to Holders of ADSs
data.description: In Nanjing, China on April 23, 2026, Tuniu Corporation (NASDAQ: TOUR), a prominent online leisure travel company in China, announced the distribution of a cash dividend totaling US$1.197 per American depositary shares ("ADSs") to ADS holders. The dividend is set to be paid out shortly to eligible holders.

data.title: Strider Launches Agentic Operating System to Power Next Generation of Strategic Intelligence
data.description: Strider Technologies, Inc. has announced the launch of a new intelligence operating system that aims to streamline intelligence delivery across their products. This system is set to revolutionize the transformation of complex global data into actionable insights. The announcement was made in London on April 23, 2026. As a top provider of strategic intelligence, Strider Technologies continues to lead the industry with this innovative development.

data.title: IFS Loops launches Agent Studio
data.description: IFS, a company based in Palo Alto, California, revealed on April 23, 2026, the launch of pre-built Field Service Digital Workers for Planning, Dispatch, and Knowledge Work. These workers can aid service-oriented businesses in quickly deploying agents, with no need for customization. As a significant player in Industrial AI software, IFS's announcement signals a move towards streamlining operations and optimizing service delivery.
New program by WisdomTree offering Collateralised ETP Securities.

data.title: Braze Delivers Powerful New Agentic AI Capabilities That Transform How Marketers Build, Personalize, and Deliver Customer Experiences
data.description: In London, Braze (Nasdaq: BRZE) announced the launch of cutting-edge AI features, enhancing the customer engagement platform. These new capabilities aim to revolutionize how marketers create and provide captivating experiences for their customers. The integrated platform offers a comprehensive solution for managing the entire customer journey, from attracting new audiences to boosting conversions and fostering long-lasting loyalty. BrazeAI's innovative offerings bring a cohesive approach to customer lifecycle management.

data.title: Braze Unveils New Research Showing How AI, Data, and Decisioning Are Redefining Customer Engagement
data.description: Today, Braze, a prominent customer engagement platform listed on Nasdaq as BRZE, unveiled two new research reports conducted by Forrester Consulting and Cowry in London. These studies emphasize significant changes in brand strategies needed in customer engagement with the emergence of AI. The research reveals that AI usage is widespread, yet many companies are facing challenges in leveraging this technology to drive substantial business outcomes. This indicates a gap between AI adoption and its impact on organizations, showcasing a critical need for brands to refine their approach to customer engagement in the modern AI era.

data.title: Cloudsmith Raises $72M Series C Led by TCV with Participation from Insight Partners to Control and Secure the AI-Powered Software Supply Chain
data.description: Cloudsmith, a company originating in Belfast, Northern Ireland, has revealed a successful funding round of $72 million in Series C. The purpose of this funding is to protect the software supply chain from emerging AI-driven threats.

data.title: Faculty Launches Frontier Plug-in Marketplace, Accelerating How Organisations Build and Scale Decision Intelligence
data.description: In a recent update, Frontier has introduced new modular plug-ins aimed at enhancing platform capabilities and improving integration with current enterprise tools. This release, unveiled in London on April 23, 2026, by Faculty, the creator of the Decision Intelligence platform Faculty Frontier™, is set to empower technical teams with expanded functionality. These advancements are poised to streamline operations and bolster collaboration between various systems.

data.title: MongoDB Announces €74M Ireland Expansion, 200 Jobs, and New Cork Office
data.description: A significant investment of €74 million is being made to enhance MongoDB's operations in Ireland, focusing on expanding engineering and AI development. This move is set to bring about the creation of approximately 200 new jobs by 2027. This expansion will see the Irish workforce grow by over 50%, reaching a total of 500+ employees. With locations in Dublin for the International Headquarters and a new office in Cork, this initiative aims to support over 65,200 customers in transitioning their AI projects from experimental phases to...
